3020310.name: Air Warrior II
3020310.description:
Flight Simulation: Take control of over 35 aircraft across 300 missions in three immersive historical campaigns!

Engage in the ultimate dogfighting experience, where you can climb, dive, twist, and loop through the skies, hunting down your enemy in thrilling one-on-one aerial combat!

With Air Warrior II, the pinnacle of dogfighting simulations, you'll fly over 35 different aircraft from WWI, WWII, and Korea. Challenge advanced aerial AI across more than 300 missions, recreating legendary historical campaigns. Soar in a Spitfire during the Battle of Britain or lead a B17 bombing formation in daring daylight raids over Europe.

Prepare yourself for hours of exhilarating aerial combat in this unforgettable flight simulation experience!

Features:

- 300 immersive single-player missions spanning WWI, WWII, and the Korean War, with a range of fighters, bombers, and troop transports to command.

- Take on advanced AI, offering realistic and challenging aerial combat.

- Join a team as a gunner in a bomber or take control of an anti-aircraft tank for intense ground-based action.
3020310.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
